title: ‘Old John’ Rose – Rich Orange Blooms – Floribunda - 4 Litre Pot
features: Lovely Orange semi-double blooms with dark green glossy foliage.
The blooms have a light fragrance and the plant itself can grow up to around 0.5 -1.0m when fully grown.
'Old John’ tends to be healthy with good disease resistance and hardiness and repeat flowers throughout the season.
This plant will brighten up any space through the summer and into the autumn.
Old John’ is repeat flowering, has an abundance of flowers giving a great pop of colour and can easily be used to create a showcase piece to your garden.
Great gift idea or as a lovely new addition for your garden.
UK rose growers with over 20 years’ experience supplying 1st grade roses directly from our fields.
